main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/1.04|1.04]] |gameversion=1.04 |date=February 27, 2024 |summary='''Ed Release'''. Several balance changes and bug fixes. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/en/battle_change/20240227 Patch Notes] }} == Ed Patch == * Ed released
== '''Universal Changes''' == * {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} ** Simultaneous activation no longer randomly gives the frame advantage to one player * Perfect Parry ** Fixed issue where a Perfect Parry could occur when absorbing a hit on the 3rd startup frame * Armor Break ** Fixed issue where Armor Break would not occur properly if the defender was in armor hitstop from another attack * Input Buffers ** Fixed issue where input buffer after blocking an attack was not set correctly for {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} and some other attacks * Modern Controls''' ** Fixed issue where {{clr|DR|S}} button would not result in damage scaling if a special was input during a {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} screen freeze
== '''Character Changes''' == === '''A.K.I.''' === * {{clr|L|2LP}} ** Range increased 0.94 → 0.96 * {{clr|M|5MP}} ** Active frames increased 3 → 5 (better meaty setups, stronger in neutral)
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * {{clr|L|5LP}} ** Hurtbox expanded downward on startup (more easily counterpoked by low-angled attacks) * Aerial Lightning Kicks (j.236K) ** 20% Starter scaling added (less rewarding on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} when used against throws)
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * {{clr|L|Funky Slicer}} ({{clr|L|214K~LK}}) ** Less pushback on block ** Larger hurtbox during recovery (easier to pressure Dee Jay or whiff punish)
=== '''Dhalsim''' === * {{clr|H|HP Yoga Flame}} ({{clr|H|63214HP}}) ** Fixed issue where 2nd hit dealt normal damage on {{clr|PC|Counter-hit/Punish Counter}}
=== '''Jamie''' === * Forward Throw ({{clr|L|LPLK}}) ** Can now hold {{clr|L|LP}}+{{clr|L|LK}} to gain 1 Drink Level (prevents throw loop, but Jamie is still KD +7) * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Damage increased by 100 on both the regular version and Drink ender ** Reduced pushback on Hit in the corner ** KD Advantage increased by 5 frames (allows Jamie to use Drink ender while maintaining oki) * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** After the install timer ends, Jamie retains his previous Drink Level (no longer resets to DL0)
=== '''JP''' === * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Expanded foot/torso hurtbox during active and recovery frames * {{clr|H|2HP}} ** Arm hurtbox is no longer anti-air invincible (more susceptible to trading on late anti-air attempts) * Departure (214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** 20% Starter scaling added ** Increased opponent's Drive gauge recovery on Parry: 5000 → 7500 (regular) / 2500x2 → 3500x2 ({{clr|OD|OD}}) * Amnesia (22K/{{clr|OD|KK}}), successful counter ** JP no longer builds {{clr|SA|Super}} meter while bombs are active or until combo ends ** Bombs no longer dissipate {{clr|SA|Super}}-priority projectiles ** Starter scaling (when Bomb starts the combo) increased 15% → 50% ** Immediate scaling (when comboing into Bomb) increased 15% → 60% ** Canceling an attack into {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} now detonates the Bombs immediately to prevent bypassing this damage scaling
=== '''Ken''' === * Forward Throw ({{clr|L|LPLK}}) ** More pushback against cornered opponents (can still walk for a throw loop with ~3f timing window) * {{clr|L|5LP}} ** Hurtbox expanded downward on startup (more easily counterpoked by low-angled attacks) * {{clr|OD|OD Air Tatsu}} ({{clr|OD|j.214KK}}) ** Landing recovery on whiff increased 14 → 21 (harder to escape the corner) ** Collision box expanded so opponents are less likely to jump over this move
=== '''Luke''' === * {{clr|M|2MP}} ** Whiff recovery increased 14 → 17 with a larger hurtbox * Aerial Flash Knuckle (j.214P) ** When performed near the jump apex, has a shorter trajectory and landing recovery on whiff increased 13 → 20 ** Larger feet hurtbox on frame 16 until end of recovery * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236P}}) ** Wider projectile-vulnerable hurtbox on startup frames 1-5
=== '''Manon''' === * {{clr|M|En Haut 1}} ({{clr|M|4MK}}) ** Retains greater momentum out of {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214K}}) ** Juggles more consistently; if opponent drops out, their knockdown period is extended (less likely for Manon to be punished)
=== '''Rashid''' === * {{clr|L|5LP}} ** Hurtbox expanded downward on startup (more easily counterpoked by low-angled attacks) * {{clr|OD|OD Spinning Mixer}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** Now has 5 frames of Anti-Air Invuln (9-13f) after Full Invuln frames run out * Wall Jump ** Fixed issue where performing certain moves would not put Rashid into a {{FKD}} state
=== '''Ryu''' === * {{clr|H|Solar Plexus Strike}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) ** Proximity guard hitbox now reaches the full length of the move's range on frame 2 (much harder for the opponent to walk out of pressure) * Hadoken (236P) ** Reduced the extended arm hurtbox (harder to jump over, counter-poke, or punish with invincible attacks) * {{clr|OD|OD Shoryuken}} ({{clr|OD|623PP}}) ** First hit now knocks down to prevent Ryu from being punished when the 2nd hit whiffs * {{clr|L|LP Hashogeki}} ({{clr|L|214LP}}) ** Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} with reduced pushback on block ** Increased pushback on block vs. Burnout * {{clr|M|MP Hashogeki}} ({{clr|M|214MP}}) ** Expanded the attack and projectile clash hitbox forward * {{clr|H|HP Hashogeki}} ({{clr|H|214HP}}) ** Reduced pushback on block ** Expanded the attack and projectile clash hitbox forward * {{clr|OD|OD Hashogeki}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) ** Reduced pushback on hit/block ** Expanded the attack and projectile clash hitbox forward * Denjin Hashogeki (Denjin 214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** Reduced pushback on block ** Expanded the attack and projectile clash hitbox forward ** {{clr|OD|Denjin OD}} version damage increased 600 → 1000 * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236P}}) ** Reduced the extended arm hurtbox (harder to jump over or punish with invincible attacks, and more effective against other projectiles)
=== '''Zangief''' === * {{clr|OD|OD Double Lariat}} ({{clr|OD|PPP}}) ** 1st hit combos into {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} when canceled (causes a brief crumple state on grounded opponents) ** Faster horizontal movement on startup ** 2nd hit connects vs. grounded opponents 1f earlier (for combo consistency) ** 1st hit reduced knockback distance vs. airborne opponents * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Hitbox extended downward (can juggle and anti-air more consistently)
